query:
SELECT r.id, r.customer_name, r.created_at,
       ro.order_id, ro.reference_num, ro.po_num,
       r.allocation_detail
FROM allocation_runs r
JOIN allocation_run_orders ro ON ro.run_id = r.id
WHERE r.customer_name LIKE '%Amercare%'
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
LIMIT 3;
